description: Do not add a root Pages Wrangler R2 binding before the target bucket exists. Cloudflare account currently rejects R2 operations with code 10042 until R2 is enabled.
resolution: Keep the binding as infra/r2/pages-wrangler.jsonc.example, enable R2 first, provision buckets, then apply the Pages binding.

title: Serve Senshac content static-first on Cloudflare
rationale: Prerender ordinary multilingual content and execute Workers only for contact, Tina visual-editing islands, media APIs, queues, and other true runtime boundaries. This preserves editing and delivery capabilities while reducing request-time Tina fetches and Worker invocations.
